name: Irish Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and caster sugar until smooth.
2. Gradually add the plain flour and cornflour, mixing well.
3. Form the mixture into squares or rounds on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake in a slow oven at 150°C (300°F) for about 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
5. Turn off the oven and let cool completely on the baking sheet before removing from the paper.
